<!--
  Thank you for contributing to DramaClaw!
  A short, well-scoped PR is easier to review than a long one — prefer several
  small PRs over one mega-PR when the work is separable.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, in one or two sentences? -->

## Why

<!--
  Why is this change needed? Link the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #123") or
  describe the user-visible problem. If this came from a discussion, link it.
-->

## How

<!--
  Key implementation choices and any trade-offs worth flagging. Call out anything
  a reviewer might otherwise miss — non-obvious edge cases, migration steps,
  perf implications, or stage order changes in the pipeline.
-->

## Tests

<!--
  - How was this verified?
  - Which automated tests were added or updated?
  - If the change is visual (studio UI, rendered output), include before/after
    screenshots or a short clip.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope of the PR matches the title / summary
- [ ] New behaviour has tests (unit or integration)
- [ ] `make lint` and `make test` pass locally (or CI is green)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed (README / docs/ / schemas)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] Linked issue / discussion (if applicable)

## Screenshots / clips

<!-- Optional. Drag images or videos directly into this box to embed them. -->
